questions.question: The author says Jesus was designated by God as a high priest in the order of whom?
questions.feedback: Jesus was designated a high priest in the order of Melchizedek.

questions.question: The author rebukes the readers because by now they ought to be what?
questions.feedback: By this time they ought to be teachers, but they still need basic instruction.

questions.question: Jesus learned obedience through what he suffered.
questions.feedback: Although he was a son, he learned obedience through what he suffered.

questions.question: The readers still need _____ rather than solid food.
questions.feedback: They need milk, not solid food, because they are spiritually immature.

questions.question: No one takes the honor of high priest upon himself but must be _____ by God.
questions.feedback: One must be called by God to serve as high priest, just as Aaron was.
